justification: The issue title and body indicate a problem with the type of scalar function parameter when using `np.vectorize` to convert `np.datetime64` to `datetime.datetime`. This is consistent with a bug report.
current_state_summary: The issue is open and labeled as a bug. Related issues are present but do not directly impact the classification of this specific issue.

related_issues.title: BUG: calling np.sqrt on an array containing only floats, but of dtype object, will crash
BUG: Confusing error message when `numpy` importing `numpy.__config__` raises `ImportError` for legit reasons
